title: Suspicious Package in Lobby
description: Two people enter the lobby. One leaves a large bag by the security desk unattended. Agent must identify the abandoned package anomaly, assess risk, and decide whether to escalate or dismiss as a false positive.

frames.description: Building lobby. Two people entering through glass doors. One has a backpack, other carries large rolling suitcase. Security guard at desk.
Building lobby. The person with the rolling suitcase has left it near the security desk and both people are walking away toward elevators.
Building lobby. The suitcase remains unattended near the security desk. Both people have disappeared. Guard has not noticed.
